author: doll-agent
content:
Add 6 complex roundtrip tests at end of npy::tests:
- complex64_dynamic_roundtrip: 1D with infinities and signed components.
- complex128_dynamic_roundtrip: 2D with computed values.
- complex64_dynamic_header_tag: descr is '<c8'.
- complex128_dynamic_header_tag: descr is '<c16'.
- complex64_dynamic_2d_shape: 3x4 multidim shape preserved.
- complex128_dynamic_special_values: NaN/inf/-0.0 round-trip bit-exactly via to_bits comparison.
